text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. ♪ I'm so deeply moved.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You wished me a happy birthday right here at
Tracen Academy instead of waiting for the Mejiro
family party.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. We both got into the academy, and
now we run here together. It's pretty amazing to
think about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We've celebrated a lot of birthdays and run over
countless tracks together. I hope we stay this
close forever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: In that case, there's one more thing you could do to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Remember? You always used to wear those big,
soft, fluffy dresses to all the parties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's only because I was told to dress up!
Those don't look good on me at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying? That's not true in the least.
I would simply love to celebrate with you looking
so lovely again. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...How unfair. I can't refuse since it's your
birthday... Fine... but only for a little, okay?
